description: Finn Bags discusses his recent experience on a MrBeast stream, detailing the preparation and execution of a significant donation during the live event. He shares insights about his app, Bags, and the fundraising efforts of Team Water and their coin, Watercoin.
topic_summary: Finn Bags shares his journey into live streaming and fundraising, including a $100,000 donation during a MrBeast stream [t=185]. He explains the role of his app, Bags, in supporting creators and the success of Team Water's fundraising efforts [t=119].
